description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof, surrounded by a well-manicured hedge and featuring a spacious driveway with multiple parked cars. The front facade includes large windows, a covered carport, and a prominent entryway with steps leading up to the main door. The backyard is expansive, containing a lawn, patio furniture, a trampoline, a treehouse, and a small shed, providing ample outdoor recreational space. The house exterior is primarily white with some accent colors on window frames and doors, and the windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern. The property is enclosed by a green hedge, offering privacy and a clear boundary from the surrounding environment. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a carport, and a spacious backyard featuring a lawn, patio, and recreational amenities. The property is enclosed by a manicured hedge and includes multiple outdoor living spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, carport, driveway with cars, and a glimpse of the backyard amenities.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended driveway, additional parking, and the transition from paved areas to the large backyard lawn.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with patio furniture, trampoline, treehouse, and the open lawn area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the backyard, treehouse, and the full extent of the driveway and parking area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and some accent colors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a prominent door under a carport, accented by large windows and minimal decorative elements.
